sections.paragraph:
to braid (flechten), to interweave (Ch. and Syr. סְרַג, ܣܪܰܓ id.). Kindred roots are שָׂרַךְ, שָׂרַק and as I judge, אָרַג to weave; comp. under letter שׂ. Also with the middle radical softened into a vowel, שׂוּךְ, סוּג.

Pual, to be woven together, Job 40:17.

Hithpael, to interweave oneself, Lam 1:14.

Derivatives, שָׂרִיגִים and pr. שְׂרוּג.

I.
